title: Sunny Shoers
description:
This modpack is an alrounder fabric modpack, which provides the best gaming experience on any survival multiplayer
Just try it yourself and make your own experiences
body:
This modpack is an fabric modpack, which provides the best gaming experience on any survival multiplayer server.
There are mods like, Simple Voice Chat, Sodium, Iris and many other handy mods included, which you can always use.
This modpack is there to enjoy the best gaming experience.
Just try it yourself and make your own experiences.

The server must also support the mod Simple Voice Chat to use this feature

The Ressourcepack Stay True (Stay_True_1.21.zip) is from CurseForge, Link: "https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true"
